text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I move from the serene emptiness of a modern meeting space into the vibrant energy of a research and development exhibit. The transition from one room's orderly silence into a burst of color, screens, and words gives rise to curiosity. Here, surrounded by innovation and inquiry, I feel inspired yet somewhat disoriented—invited to pause and reflect on the confluence of thought, creation, and discovery. There is a sense that I am on the threshold of ideas in motion, absorbed in the collective striving toward knowledge.
